case_title: IGNACIO PELAYO SOLTERO VS. MARCO POLO RAMIREZ LEDESMA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-20-2018 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY SOLTERO, IGNACIO PELAYO LEDESMA, MARCO POLO RAMIREZ

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-20-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-20-2018 BY LESLIE C. NICHOLS. 506 PLAINTIFF IGNACIO PELAYO SOLTERO APPEARED THROUGH SPANISH INTERPRETER NINA SAFDIE. DEFENDANT MARCO POLO RAMIREZ LEDESMA APPEARED THROUGH SPANISH INTERPRETER SHANNON RAINTREE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: LESLIE C. NICHOLS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-30-2018 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION AND SPANISH INTERPRETER FOR BOTH PARTIES TO AUG-20-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF IGNACIO PELAYO SOLTERO APPEARED THROUGH SPANISH INTERPRETER DANIEL NAVARRO. DEFENDANT MARCO POLO RAMIREZ LEDESMA APPEARED THROUGH SPANISH INTERPRETER DANIEL NAVARRO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM ANDREA MCGARY, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,636.25 FILED BY SOLTERO, IGNACIO PELAYO AS TO DEFENDANT LEDESMA, MARCO POLO RAMIREZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-30-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 4.00 - SERVED JUN-22-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEDESMA, MARCO POLO RAMIREZ

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SOLTERO, IGNACIO PELAYO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LEDESMA, MARCO POLO RAMIREZ STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
